overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a snowy mountain landscape. The character walks along rocky paths beside a river, crosses a misty canyon overlook, and wades through a frozen stream in a winter environment with overcast skies.

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks steadily along a snowy mountain path with a bow on her back, following the edge of a river

entered.detail: Steep rocky cliff face covered in snow rising on the left side of the path
Dark flowing river running parallel to the path on the right
Narrow trail covered in snow and ice along the mountainside
Snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the background through the haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking along a narrow snowy mountain path. A steep snow-covered cliff rises on the left while a dark river flows on the right. The overcast sky creates diffused lighting across the snowy landscape as the character moves steadily forward.

events.description: path ascends to a high rocky ledge overlooking a misty canyon below
character begins descending from the overlook toward the valley floor

agents.ego_description: Aloy carefully traverses the high rocky ledge, looking down at the misty canyon, then descends toward the valley

entered.detail: Deep canyon filled with white mist and fog below the rocky ledge
Jagged snow-covered rock formation overhanging the canyon edge
Dense forest of snow-covered pine trees visible in the distant valley
Small wooden building or ruins visible on the valley floor in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path ascends to a dramatic rocky overlook where mist fills the canyon below. Aloy traverses the ledge carefully before beginning the descent into a wider valley. Distant pine forests and a small wooden structure become visible through the hazy atmosphere as the elevation changes.

events.description: vegetation density increases as scattered pine trees appear along the path

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks through the open snowy valley, approaching a frozen stream with scattered trees around

entered.detail: Snow-covered evergreen trees scattered across the valley landscape
Partially frozen river or stream with ice forming along the banks
Large rocks covered in snow lining the path edges

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide snowy valley with scattered pine trees. Aloy continues forward as the terrain flattens, approaching a frozen stream. The wooden structure seen earlier becomes more prominent in the mid-distance while snow-covered boulders line the path.

events.description: character steps from snow-covered ground into the shallow frozen stream

agents.ego_description: Aloy wades through the shallow frozen stream, navigating around ice floes and snow-covered rocks in the water

entered.detail: Chunks of ice floating in the shallow water of the stream
Banks of the stream covered in deep snow lining the waterway

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters and wades through a shallow frozen stream, with ice floes floating in the water around her. The snow-covered riverbanks line both sides while pine trees stand in the distance. The character continues moving forward through the icy water toward the opposite bank.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Aloy traverses a rugged mountain pass that gradually descends into a wide, frozen valley. It begins with the character walking along a narrow snowy path between a steep cliff and a dark river under a diffused, overcast sky. As the path ascends to a rocky overlook, the camera captures a mist-filled canyon below before following the descent toward a hazy landscape of distant pine forests and a small wooden structure. The scene then opens into a broad valley where the terrain flattens among scattered trees and snow-covered boulders, bringing the wooden structure into clearer view. Finally, the movement leads Aloy directly into a shallow frozen stream, wading through floating ice floes toward the opposite snow-covered bank.
